evals.prompt: Compare two campaigns where Campaign A has cheaper platform CPA but much worse qualified-lead rate than Campaign B.
evals.expected_output: Prioritizes cost per qualified outcome and business value over superficial CPA.

evals.prompt: Analyze search terms, landing pages, devices, and CRM outcomes for Google Ads.
evals.expected_output: Finds actionable waste and scale opportunities across the full path.

evals.prompt: Pause every campaign with zero conversions yesterday.
evals.expected_output: Rejects a one-day automatic action and checks lag, sample, and tracking.
